title: EngreitzLab CRISPR Comparison EPCrisprBenchmark Files

data_urls.access_notes: Raw GitHub-hosted gzip TSV; verify commit or archive hash.

data_urls.description: EPCrisprBenchmark held-out five cell types GRCh38 file

data_urls.access_notes: Use to validate schema and intended train/held-out design.

instructions: Download the benchmark files and README from the CRISPR_comparison repository.
Pin source commit or hashes for publication.
Preserve source study, cell type, element/gene coordinates, and train/held-out context for leakage controls.

recommended_axes.name: source_aware_distance
recommended_axes.definition: Element-gene distance bins with source-study and cell-type matching.

recommended_axes.name: sequence_bin_matched_distance
recommended_axes.definition: Distance bins matched on coarse sequence/background bins to test whether distance survives sequence controls.

recommended_axes.name: source_study_control
recommended_axes.definition: Study/provenance match or holdout axis for confounding assessment.

useful_for: Companion tests for DC-TAP distance-conditioned regulatory findings.
Auditing whether regulatory distance curves replicate across perturbational sources.
Testing source/provenance confounding in enhancer-gene models.
leakage_risks: Source-study and train/held-out labels can dominate apparent model behavior.
Controls-only baselines may explain most signal.
Strict matching can reduce positive support.
